programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley and Rosie Wolfenden follow as three hobby crafters present their works for the first time at Brancepeth Castle Craft Fair in Durham. Occupational therapist Olivia dyes her own yarn and produces hand-woven pieces, ex-builder Neil makes quirky metal ornaments and Wendi now makes her own glass pieces uses the art of fusing - and for the fair she even learns the art of glass blowing

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes look at life on board the Seven Seas Explorer features head sommelier Georgiana, as the vessel prepares for a special visit to Bordeaux. Cameras go below deck and take a peek at the unique connoisseur drinks cellar with its £3,000 bottle of cognac and observes members of the night crew as they work to get the ship looking as good as new for the morning

programme.title: Elephant Hospital
programme.desc: The work of a Thailand hospital devoted solely to treating elephants. The two-part documentary reveals the day-to-day challenges of dealing with supersized patients suffering everything from deadly viruses to cuts and parasites. It also shows how the facility teaches baby elephants new commands and even turns elephant poo into fertiliser

programme.title: Elephant Hospital
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dr Paul O'Donoghue joins the expert vets in Thailand at the world's largest hospital devoted solely to treating elephants. A night-time emergency stretches the hospital as three sick female elephants from the same sanctuary are admitted with colic. One of the patients arrives with her four-month-old baby, who stays while her mother receives treatment, but it proves to be a massive task to nurse these big patients back to health

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: All nine children return home for Christmas. Clemmy has her hands full nursing a premature calf, while Clive has fixed up an ancient contraption to cook the festive roast. When an owl is sighted in one of the barns, the family comes up with a plan to encourage more birds to roost there. Miles rigs up a night vision system to keep an eye on their guest, while Sidney traps pests to lure it out

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: The family has recently discovered that their home is more than 700 years old, which inspires Edith and Violet to search the barn for evidence of previous occupants. Clemmy helps Amanda to treat a ewe suffering from a nasty ailment, while the discovery of a collection of toy steam trains sparks a restoration project for Clive and the boys

programme.title: Lord Mountbatten: Hero or Villain?
programme.desc: When Louis Mountbatten, the Queen's cousin and Prince Philip's uncle, was murdered by the IRA in 1979 he was lauded as a war hero, an elder statesman and a much-loved member of the royal family. But did the public perception disguise the truth? As a military leader he was responsible for significant loss of life, while as a statesman he was responsible for the badly planned and poorly executed partition of India, which still has repercussions today

programme.title: Elizabeth II & the Traitor King: A Secret Friendship
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of King Edward VIII, told through the prism of his turbulent relationship with his niece, Princess Elizabeth, who ultimately became Queen Elizabeth II. Throughout the programme, the twists and turns of Edward and Elizabeth's complicated relationship are given full exploration, and experts contrast the artistic license of such dramas as The Crown with pivotal moments from their relationship that are known to be true

programme.title: When Classic TV Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Less-than-perfect moments from some of the nation's favourite shows over the years. From the black and white days of the 1960s and Dixon of Dock Green, to the 1970s and The Generation Game, right through the 80s, 90s and 00s to the present day. There are disastrous moments from classic stars, including Lenny Henry, Lorraine Kelly, Oliver Reed and Russell Harty. Narrated by Chris Tarrant

What her neighbours don't know is that plans for a new caravan park are afoot, and Bambi's bosses have asked her to relocate. Narrated by John Thomson

programme.title: Inside Tesco: 24/7
programme.desc: The retailer's transformation from a cut-price upstart to market leader. After the death of its founder Jack Cohen in 1979, the company was in the middle of a high-risk transition and an outside takeover was a real danger. Ian MacLaurin, Jack Cohen's first management trainee, was chief executive at the time. His vision for the company was very different from Jack's pile-it-high, sell-it cheap approach. He set out to transform the company and compete with the number one retailer Sainsbury's - something that was achieved in 1995

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor visits York Minster, which over the past 800 years, has been a backdrop to some of the most dramatic events in British history. It houses more than half of all the world's medieval glass, including the Rose Window, commissioned by Henry VIII, and the East Window, the largest stained glass window in the world. A succession of outspoken bishops of York have defied Nazis, married kings and queens, and more recently championed equality with Archbishop John Sentamu, the country's first black bishop, consecrating the world's first female bishop, Libby Lane, in 2014.

programme.title: Deadly Delusion (2017)
programme.desc: In search of a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, strange things begin to happen, and Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her. Thriller, starring Haylie Duff, Mike Faiola and Teri Polo

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Jan and her son Glen. She moved to Saydo in Andalucia 17 years ago with her husband Ken, who passed away over the summer. To celebrate Ken's love of a good knees-up, Glen's putting on the biggest party Saydo's ever seen. Plus, a look at Benalmadena, where Laura and Phil, together with six of their friends back in the UK, have bought two bars. John Thomson narrates

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Amy and Roxy face off after Amy's accusation of theft, and Sheila sees Levi is still caught up in depressed thoughts about Bea, so resolves to keep his mind occupied

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella is excited about her exhibition with Emmett, but is frustrated at him for getting distracted with other girls. Nikau's focus on his body image puts his health in danger

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: Dashcam footage of some of Britain's worst driving offenders, from suspected drug drivers and high-speed chases, to stolen vehicles and banned motorists. Officers from Cheshire Police follow a potentially dangerous driver, and in Warrington, cameras pick up a suspected stolen white van on the move. Elsewhere, an officer in Sandbach spots a suspicious young driver who bumps into a traffic island

programme.title: Wetherspoons: How Do They Do It?!
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the inner workings of one of the UK's most popular pub chains, shining a light on the secrets of the brand's success. The programme explores how Wetherspoons has gained ground on its rivals by being cheaper, quicker or more responsive to customer demands, and reveals some of the tactics used to keep their customers coming back, from cheap deals on food and drink to opening their doors morning, noon and night

programme.title: Great British Gardens with Carol Klein
programme.desc: Carol visits the garden of 16th-century manor house Wollerton Old Hall in Shropshire, a beautiful and intricate four-acre oasis in the English garden tradition. With its traditional craftsmanship, sympathetic architecture, elegant topiary and hedges, and deep borders, it looks like it's been here for 100 years, but owners Lesley and John only bought the property in 1983, and since then have set about recapturing the spirit and quality of a bygone era

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A toddler is rushed in with suspected sepsis, a life-threatening condition that attacks the organs, and a large team of specialists administer high-strength antibiotics. Elsewhere, advanced nurse practitioner Cheryl is looking after 57-year-old Michael, who has come in with severe abdominal pain, and an 87-year-old woman is rushed in after being knocked over by a car

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A woman collapses unexpectedly during a day out with her family to an adventure park, and is left unable to move or walk. The trauma team leader diagnoses a bleed on her brain that requires urgent surgery. A neurosurgeon attempts to drain the build-up of fluid in her brain. A motorist suffers a cardiac arrest behind the wheel, caused by a large clot in an artery, and a van driver is airlifted to hospital after a major traffic collision

programme.title: Emergency Transplants: The Gift of Life
programme.desc: Documentary following people awaiting organ transplants, including a six-year-old having a heart transplant and a woman with chronic kidney disease

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Andrea and Paul arrived in Spain 15 years ago and never went home. They run a show bar in La Cala and have recently closed their doors to double its size. They've wiped out their savings and invested 50,000 euros in the refurb. But tourism has been quiet this year and their potential goldmine has had to stay shut for six months. They've now got a date to reopen - but have they got their timing right? Cameras also return to Saydo Park, an enclave full of static caravans, mobile homes and Brits at the foot of the Andalusian Mountains

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: Built more than 1,400 years ago, Canterbury Cathedral is both a holy place and a World Heritage site. It is the 'mother church' for more than 85 million people, and one of the biggest tourist attractions in the UK with nearly a million visitors a year. Tony tells the tale of the cathedral's founding and how, after the cathedral burnt down, it was rebuilt by the Normans as a symbol of their power. He also explores how it became wealthy thanks to its role as a major site of pilgrimage following the infamous murder of Archbishop Thomas Becket

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton and Ann Maurice set to work on a property in Warrington, Cheshire, which the homeowner is having difficulty selling. They begin by repainting the pine and ripping out the netting

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is an admirer of Ruby, the Flying Doctors' plane. However, when a cyclone hits and it's too dangerous for Ruby to fly, Thomas has to head to the rescue

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Rocky must save himself, after Mayor Humdinger strands him on an island full of trash

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.desc: The Starship Enterprise races to the rescue of intergalactic ambassadors held hostage on a distant planet. The crisis proves to be the handiwork of a renegade Vulcan mystic who kidnaps Captain Kirk and his crew, ordering them to fly to an unexplored world where he hopes to fulfil his insane ambition - to meet God. Sci-fi adventure, written, directed by and starring William Shatner, with Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley and David Warner

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country (1991)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk is framed for the assassination of the Klingon head of state just as the Federation is about to make peace with their old enemies. As Kirk and Dr McCoy are banished to an icy prison planet, Spock tries to uncover the identity of the real killers. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley, Christopher Plummer, with appearances by Christian Slater and Michael Dorn from Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: Generations (1994)
programme.desc: USS Enterprise Captain Jean-Luc Picard must stop a deranged genius obsessed with gaining access to a mysterious energy source - regardless of the threat to entire civilisations that lie in his path. Help arrives from an unlikely quarter - his supposedly long dead predecessor Captain James T Kirk. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, William Shatner, Malcolm McDowell and Whoopi Goldberg

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise face their deadliest enemies, the Borg, who travel back in time in an attempt to change Earth's history. The starship follows on a mission to foil their plan, but the vessel is taken over by members of the cyborg collective, leaving Picard consumed by a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner, James Cromwell and Alice Krige

programme.title: Star Trek: Insurrection (1998)
programme.desc: Captain Picard and the Enterprise crew uncover a conspiracy by their own superiors and a sinister alien race to take over a peaceful world and exploit its power to prolong life. However, the crew is forced to defy Federation orders and turns renegade to protect the planet's inhabitants. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, F Murray Abraham, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner and Michael Dorn

programme.title: Watchmen (2009)
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, former superheroes driven into retirement by public outcry are confronted with the murder of one of their number. As they face the possibility of a conspiracy to eliminate them, they must contend with a world edging closer to the brink of nuclear war. Sci-fi drama, based on Alan Moore and Dave Gibbons' graphic novel, starring Patrick Wilson, Jackie Earle Haley, Malin Akerman and Billy Crudup

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway (2018)
programme.desc: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton are sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more terrifying. Horror, starring Lalor Roddy, Ciaran Flynn and Helena Bereen

programme.title: My Life as a Courgette (2016)
programme.desc: After losing his mother, a young boy is sent to a foster home with other orphans his age, where he begins to learn the meaning of trust and true love. Animation, with the voices of Gaspard Schlatter, Sixtine Murat and Paulin Jaccoud

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son (2011)
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm dons his old lady disguise for a third time as he goes undercover to investigate a murder in a girls' school. His teenage son, who witnessed the crime, is forced to join him on the case, assuming a female identity of his own to enrol as a student. Comedy, with Martin Lawrence and Brandon T Jackson

programme.title: The Great Escape (1963)
programme.desc: The most rebellious Allied prisoners of war are sent to a supposedly escape-proof maximum-security detention camp during the Second World War. They plan an ingenious mass breakout by digging a tunnel, but even when free of the camp, making it across occupied Europe proves a dangerous journey. Drama, starring Steve McQueen, James Coburn, Donald Pleasence, James Garner, Charles Bronson and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Ray's jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Sinister 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A mother and her twin sons move into a rural house, unaware it is occupied by an evil spirit. She struggles to protect the boys from the creature's malign influence, but also has to contend with the ghosts of its victims urging one of the brothers to kill the other. Horror sequel, starring Shannyn Sossamon and James Ransone

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Punk Chef Scott Garthwaite travels to Yorkshire to make sure no food goes to waste. He visits a Michelin Starred restaurant, allotment owned by a Deaf foodie and a creamery

programme.title: Santa Fe Passage (1955)
programme.desc: A wagon scout accused of collusion with Apaches is given a chance to redeem himself when he is hired to transport a shipment of arms to Santa Fe. The owner of the valuable freight happens to be a mixed-race woman and at first he shows her only disrespect, but has to overcome his prejudice when he finds himself falling for her. Western adventure, with John Payne, Faith Domergue and Slim Pickens

programme.title: Apache Drums (1951)
programme.desc: A gunslinging gambler is thrown out of an isolated frontier town for his improper behaviour. He returns to warn the unsuspecting settlers of an impending attack by a band of Apaches fighting to regain possession of their lost territory - but struggles to convince them of the danger. Western, starring Stephen McNally, Willard Parker, Coleen Gray and Arthur Shields

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly (1966)
programme.desc: A cynical, mercenary cattle drover sets out to deliver a herd to soldiers at a Union base during the American Civil War. During the journey, he is kidnapped by a Confederate colonel, who hopes to persuade him to help steal the animals and take them deep into rebel territory. Western, starring William Holden, Richard Widmark and Janice Rule

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas (an all-female a cappella singing group) reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour. However, they face a squad who uses both instruments and voices. Final part of the blockbusting comedy trilogy, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: Mommy (2014)
programme.desc: A widow decides to take her violent teenage son out of the institution that has been his home for the past three years. However, his behaviour begins to spiral out of control, and she is forced to turn to a mysterious new neighbour for help. Drama, starring Anne Dorval, Antoine-Olivier Pilon and Suzanne Clement

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Calvin plans an over-the-top Scottish wedding at Loch Ness, but his bride-to-be Leanne has always dreamed of a simple affair

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Ben Corry is away for months at a time with the army, leaving stay-at-home mum Maria to discipline their four rowdy daughters. Jo Frost brings this military family into line

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: The Lobdells take on the Moons as a no-nonsense fire chief, who attempts to run her house like her battalion, swaps lives with a conservative, stay-at-home wife who caters to the every whim of her domineering husband

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonard's apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset to learn Penny is dating someone, so his friends encourage him to seek a new romance by asking another woman out. Sara Gilbert appears alongside her Roseanne co-star Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is fired for being disrespectful to his boss, and explores new activities in a bid to find a purpose in life other than physics, but Leonard takes drastic action to restore him to his old self. Laurie Metcalf guest stars as Sheldon's mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard fears he is wasting his time with Penny and ends up spending the night with fellow scientist Leslie. However, he is disappointed when she later tells him she was only interested in a one-night stand. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Shows including Countdown, Trevor McDonald's Indian Train Adventure, Titanic, First Dates and Serengeti come under the critical gaze of famous faces including Jessie J, Jamal Edwards, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rylan Clark-Neal, Denise Van Outen, Oti Mabuse, Chris Eubank Sr, Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson, Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Gyles Brandreth, Sheila Hancock, Emily Atack, Kate Robbins, Nick Grimshaw and Olly Alexander

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including SAS: Who Dares Wins, Dragons' Den, Three Families, Headspace: Guide to Sleep, Secret Crush, Lego Masters USA and This Morning. They also proffer their thoughts on a BBC News report about taking holidays abroad as the pandemic rules on travel are relaxed

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, including Tom Allen's Quizness, Mare of Easttown, Gregg Wallace's Big Weekend Away, Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again, Dung Dynasty, Running Wild with Bear Grylls, The Andrew Marr Show, and ITV News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during October, 2016, including The Apprentice, National Treasure, Terminator 2, Celebrity Island with Bear Grylls, The X Factor and the News

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick battles with the sinister owner of the second-hand shop where Summer has a job, but Summer is upset about his interference. Jerry helps Morty with his science project about the solar system, but they can't agree on Pluto's planetary status. Guest starring Alfred Molina, Nolan North and Rich Fulcher

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When 27 Ricks from alternate dimensions are murdered and their respective Mortys are kidnapped, Rick is framed for committing the crimes and must go after culprit - resulting in a fall-out with Morty

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When Beth and Jerry head off on a romantic Titanic-themed getaway, Rick and Summer throw a huge intergalactic house party that rapidly gets out of control, despite Morty's best efforts to keep things under control

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After a delay of six months, Rick unfreezes time hoping that everything will return to normal, but warns Morty and Summer not to touch Jerry and Beth in case unstable timelines cause parallel dimensions to develop. However, the youngsters' feelings of uncertainty fracture time and split reality, leaving them lost in oblivion with Rick

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Shows including Countdown, Trevor McDonald's Indian Train Adventure, Titanic, First Dates and Serengeti come under the critical gaze of famous faces including Jessie J, Jamal Edwards, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rylan Clark-Neal, Denise Van Outen, Oti Mabuse, Chris Eubank Sr, Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson, Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Gyles Brandreth, Sheila Hancock, Emily Atack, Kate Robbins, Nick Grimshaw and Olly Alexander

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Calvin plans an over-the-top Scottish wedding at Loch Ness, but his bride-to-be Leanne has always dreamed of a simple affair

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of exercise and pets

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A no-nonsense Nigerian mum who raises her kids in a strict culture of respect swaps lives with an overwhelmed woman whose disconnected husband and spoilt children run the house

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Checkout assistant Jamie-Lea hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from Bristol and Bath, hoping to impress Chris, Shelley, Christine and James with her flavoursome menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pig farmer Chris prepares a menu showing off his love of Italy - with one of his home-reared pigs ending up on the menu - and makes a surprising revelation about his education

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired pub landlady Christine hosts the third dinner party of the week in and around Bristol, hoping to impress her competitors and win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hummus-maker James hosts the fourth evening in and around Bristol and is confident he can beat Christine's retro meal last night. But he still has a lot to do if he is to win

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, the fifth and final cook to host is 50-year-old retiree and lady of leisure Shelley, who's hoping to impress with her tried and tested favourites. She's been talking about her holidays and lifestyle throughout the week, but will ex-pub landlady Christine have to call time on the chat tonight? She will also have to win over checkout assistant Jamie-Lea, hummus entrepreneur James, and pig farmer Chris

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to take Howard's place in the boys' video-game night while he is otherwise engaged with one of her friends. Simon Helberg, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date in the hope of initiating an arranged marriage, but after a promising start it becomes apparent that the girl in question is more interested in Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny begins her new job as a bartender. Starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jay's stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Comedy sequel, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: With Batwoman and The Crows hot on the trail of the False Face Society, their efforts collide, and tensions escalate. Sophie and Ryan find some common ground

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during October, 2016, including The Apprentice, National Treasure, Terminator 2, Celebrity Island with Bear Grylls, The X Factor and the News

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Last-ever episode of the medical comedy. Cole's brush with cancer inspires him to become a surgeon, but Turk is reluctant to act as the preppy intern's new mentor. Meanwhile, a large hole in the wall separating their two rooms gives Drew and Denise a taste of what living together would be like, and Lucy plans a tribute for the families of the cadavers she has been dissecting during her first term at medical school. Dave Franco, Donald Faison and Kerry Bishe star

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Black-ish

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas and does everything he can to win a large sum of money for science. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette take Amy shopping for a wedding dress, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro, to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of the best moments from the first series, featuring celebrities including Rylan Clark-Neal and mum Linda, Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Chris Eubank and Chris Eubank Jr, Oti, Motsi and Phemelo Mabuse, Martin and Roman Kemp, and Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock. Among the shows under review are Love Island, Naked Attraction, Killing Eve and First Dates, as well as the films Titanic and American Pie

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.desc: Harley and Ivy team up with Catwoman to steal an artefact from a museum that's been boobytrapped by none other than Dr Trap. Meanwhile, Dr Psycho tries to prove himself as a leader, which Riddler exploits as an opportunity to escape

programme.title: Birdgirl
programme.desc: Judy's assistant pulls an all-nighter and suffers monstrous consequences. Featuring the voices of Paget Brewster and Rob Delaney

programme.title: Duncanville
programme.desc: In hopes of getting a promotion, Annie tries to fill her parking ticket quota for the month. Animated comedy that revolves around a 15-year-old boy with a rich fantasy life

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching in late October 2016, including Hunted, Poldark, Meet the Parents, Strictly Come Dancing, The Young Pope, The Great British Bake Off and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Morty falls in love with an environmental superhero. Rick and Summer go on an apocalypse bar crawl. Guest starring Alison Brie, Jennifer Coolidge, Steve Buscemi and Fred Stoller

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's rooftop beach gets shut down by Sondra, the president of the board of the apartment building, so he plans to overthrow her and do the job himself. Meanwhile, Bonnie and Riley go on a double date with Brad and his twin brother Tad

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben arranges to meet up with a woman whose phone he has found, however when he ends up running late the father has to send Tucker in his place. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out that shellfish consumed by millions have been feeding on plastic discarded in the sea, with shocking global implications. Kate Quilton finds out whether the makers of Marmite can really predict whether people will love or hate their distinctive yeast-based spread, as claimed in their latest TV advert, and Tebbutt aims to solve the age-old mystery of how to smoothly extract ketchup from a bottle - by running across a pond of custard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Warren and Jacqui Sumner from Manchester first visited Crete on their honeymoon 23 years ago and have been going back ever since. They've fallen in love with the island and are now determined to buy their very own holiday home there. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £75,000 budget, but will any of them be the romantic getaway they've been dreaming of?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Alison Wright and Sheila Sagar want to go halves on a holiday home in Costa Rica to escape the British winters. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £300,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their five children all grown up, Maria and Laky Zervudachi want to downsize and find two new properties to call home. They want a family home close to their favourite town of Lewes in Sussex, so that friends and a community are nearby, and a smaller apartment in sunny Palma in Mallorca so that Maria can practise yoga outdoors all year round. Jasmine Harman shows them three impressive family properties for their budget of £900,000 in and around Lewes and Jonnie Irwin lines up three possible apartments for £300,000 in Palma

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The patisserie chefs face chocolate week, beginning with a sharing dessert using both chocolate and a favourite ingredient of judge Cherish Finden. For the showpiece, the teams must construct chocolate showpieces on a house-of-horrors theme, including a moving part, along with 48 smaller treats - all in just five hours. Presented by Tom Allen and Liam Charles

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Leeds, where the first to host is 24-year-old digital account manager Alice. Alice has never held a dinner party before, but she's hoping her family favourites will hit the spot and win her the £1,000 prize. She's hoping to impress Danielle, Andy, Lynne and Matt. With gob-smacking revelations, cringe-worthy party tricks and a ginormous Pavlova, can Alice manage to walk away with the honours?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Night two of the competition in Leeds, and company director Andy hopes to win with a menu of restaurant-inspired fare, but Alice and Danielle are more impressed with his Ferrari

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fun-loving student Danielle hosts the third dinner party in Leeds, hoping a high-calorie menu will see her emerge victorious. She even serves dessert wearing her wedding dress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre technician Matt is the fourth to host in Leeds with a menu of family favourites - and if that does not win them over, hopefully his juggling skills will do the trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the competition in Leeds, and jeweller Lynne tries to rescue her dinner party with a memorable karaoke performance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit Church Spa in East Markham in Nottinghamshire on their second evening, where proprietor Daniel Walker and family friend George Gillespie hope to wow their guests with their relaxing facilities. Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Steve and Lisa Tindall, who own the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex, where they hope their guests will fall for their boutique B&B. They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid night's sleep afterwards

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of 'beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when it's time to count up the cash

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the railways crossing the Scottish Highlands, and meeting both the workers who keep them running and the steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes. The programme takes the Strathspey steam railway through the Cairngorms National Park, taking in a charity abseiling event at the Forth Bridge along the way

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A 93-year-old war veteran may have a life-threatening infection, and a four-year-old who is pale and vomiting has to be urgently seen by a specialist

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that a 95-year-old woman may have suffered life-changing injuries to her hip and internal bleeding after falling down a flight of stairs, while the patient's daughter reflects on her mother's optimistic attitude to life's challenges. Elsewhere, a man knocked off his bike at 40mph may have suffered brain damage. His brother remembers a difficult time that brought them closer together

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy falls over and lands on his head, and is left unable to move his limbs. As he waits for the results, the boy's father shares his feelings on the challenges of parenthood. Elsewhere, an 80-year-old woman is brought in with a dangerously swollen tongue and a nine-year-old girl is treated after falling off a swing, leaving consultant Rahail considering how the balance of care between parents and children shifts over time

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Roisin Conaty taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Joe Lycett. Susie Dent is joined by Spencer Jones in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Ted struggles with a crush he has for a lady visitor, and the arrival of a group of nuns does not help matters. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly, with a guest appearance by Gemma Craven

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack is declared dead after drinking too much floor polish - and Ted is astounded to learn he has been left a fortune in the will. However, he has to fulfil certain conditions before collecting the money

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that a 95-year-old woman may have suffered life-changing injuries to her hip and internal bleeding after falling down a flight of stairs, while the patient's daughter reflects on her mother's optimistic attitude to life's challenges. Elsewhere, a man knocked off his bike at 40mph may have suffered brain damage. His brother remembers a difficult time that brought them closer together

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy falls over and lands on his head, and is left unable to move his limbs. As he waits for the results, the boy's father shares his feelings on the challenges of parenthood. Elsewhere, an 80-year-old woman is brought in with a dangerously swollen tongue and a nine-year-old girl is treated after falling off a swing, leaving consultant Rahail considering how the balance of care between parents and children shifts over time

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Ted struggles with a crush he has for a lady visitor, and the arrival of a group of nuns does not help matters. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly, with a guest appearance by Gemma Craven

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Spain to investigate how much orange is in orange squash. In snowy Canada, Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive, while Kate Quilton reveals the surprising reason why so many of the UK's favourite biscuits have little holes all over them

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to convert a German fire engine into a cabin on wheels and go on a road trip across Europe. George also visits a fly-tipping site being transformed into a nature reserve with a community classroom, while the next stage of the Spanish tour features a cutting edge cantilever house

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George is joined by leading architects to help transform some of Britain's most unloved houses into desirable properties. The team meet Simon and Lisa, who recently bought a building in rural Gloucestershire in such a shoddy state that neighbours compared it to the house in Amityville Horror. George teams the couple up with creative architect Laura Clark, who attempts to turn this terrifying building into a warm and welcoming, modern home, whilst retaining some of its original character

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, owned by Gareth and Frances Jenkins. The building was once an architectural gem, but over the years has been the victim of unsympathetic modernisations, making it unrecognisable from its 1930s heyday. The challenge is to strip away the ugly accretions to reveal the house in all its glory - while also making it suitable for modern family living. Plus, George visits a stunning seaside home and Britain's biggest collection of neon signs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room B&B in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratt's at Ty'n Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheep's testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet to find out who earned the most and have it out with their rivals. Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elvira's coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca receive a booking and prepare for the imminent arrival of their first paying guests. Martin and Kim take their chateau search up a gear and view the last property on their list. Paul and Karen embark on creating a cinema room in their barn, but the building looks set to collapse and their hopes of breaking even start to crumble. Angel helps to cushion the blow by upholstering a family heirloom

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward host another big wedding, but Edward is put out of action and with the food delayed and the weather threatening to take a turn for the worse, Anna has to work hard to pull it off without a hitch. Dick visits Tim and Rebecca as they run into structural problems on their second B&B guest suite. With only one guest room up and running, they're in a race against time to double their income by the end of the summer season. Paul tackles a leaking outbuilding to finish the cinema room, while Karen does all she can to bag their first wedding booking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Who'd a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where partners Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin hope to impress their fellow guests. On arrival, Liz and Brian are excited over their two hot tubs, and Jackie and Paul are more than happy with the complimentary champagne. However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. However, Jackie and Paul are unimpressed by their small room, and Joe and Alex find the cleanliness levels lacking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where B&B newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. They take their guests to a local maze in the afternoon and, after an uncomfortable night's sleep for Alex, some of the breakfast orders are misplaced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine welcome their guests to The Great Trewern B&B, Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where they enjoy the quiet life. Joe and Alex feel far away from it all, but the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress the other guests. At dinner, talk turns to first impressions and it appears it is all water under the bridge for Jackie and Joe, but she remains upset with the feedback Matthew and Liam gave her

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one final time to find out what they have been paid. Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin kick things off by confronting Matthew Bracegirdle and Liam Halewood about their comments regarding the cleanliness of their establishment, and Jackie and Paul Langshaw complain about their poor breakfast score

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Series following an hour in the life of ambulance crews in the West Midlands, starting with paramedic Chelsie Kennedy and technician Simon Lees rushing to save a baby, who they fight to resuscitate while rushing him to the nearest baby care unit. In Birmingham, paramedics Jo Hardwick and Peter Bowles treat a five-year-old boy who is having an asthma attack; and, across the city, student paramedic Dave Watts must attend his first cardiac arrest when an elderly woman is found in her bed without a pulse

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The edition focuses on the rapidly growing number of 999 calls connected to the over-75s. In Warminster, the emergency services are called to a crash involving three cars, which has left one person with life-changing injuries and was caused by a 75-year-old man who suffered a suspected heart attack at the wheel. PC Phil Bridge is searching Trowbridge to find a 73-year-old woman who is in the latter stages of dementia and has disappeared while out shopping with her son

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode follows the stories of people who have lived through tragic, life-changing events, and explores how these individuals endure with the strength and support of their loved ones. An 86-year-old man is rushed to St Georges by paramedics after a suspected stroke, while an 80-year-old woman is seen by doctors after falling and sustaining an open fracture to her leg. On the paediatric ward, a mother has brought her 14-year-old daughter to see a doctor after she hurt her ankle during gymnastics

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cameras capture the work of some of Britain's busiest air ambulance teams as they race to save lives. The helicopter medics cut short an appearance at a charity event in Suffolk to treat a dirtbiker who's crashed at speed. Sammy has a cardiac arrest while working at a windfarm, and Stephen breaks his thigh while off-road motorbiking in the Pennines

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Amber and Colin turn their bedroom into a dream vintage haven. After an initial assessment, the presenter begins by getting rid of any mass-produced furniture

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers look for the heirs of a man whose family worked for London Underground during the Blitz. Plus, the programme explores how investigations into an unclaimed estate revealed the story of an aviation engineer who helped design the Lysander plane before the Second World War

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo restores a pair of designer chairs, while Henry Cole breathes new life into a decrepit garden table, transforming it into a colourful and valuable new one

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and mechanic Fuzz Townshend go to Leeds to repair an AC Aceca, a British sports car that has been kept and loved by its owner Monet since the early 1970s

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two motorcyclists need specialist care, as the helicopter medics try to save the life of Pete, while Tom may have a serious spinal injury. Plus, a woman is kicked in the face by her horse. Documentary following the work of air ambulance crews

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Oaklea Barns Guest House in Southport, Merseyside, where Mandi Magee and Paul Green think their impeccable standards will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Guest House Worsthorne in Lancashire, where partners Dave Rogers and Sanchia Crossley aim to win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week, the group heads to the Sleeperdorm Backpacker Hotel in Newcastle, where Ian Nicholls hopes his guests will enjoy his cheap and cheerful concept

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B battle continues at the Parsonage Hotel and Spa near York, a 55-room country manor which wows the guests with its size, although Mandi's high cleaning standards are not met

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Oaklea Barns is first, and hosts Mandi and Paul want answers from Mark and Natalie, which ends up fanning flames

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller takes a tour of three exceptional Grand Designs homes from the last four seasons to see how they've developed and to ask the big question - was it all worth it?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Cavachon Stampy has been hit by a car and is in a critical condition, leaving owners Jim and his wife Karen facing a difficult dilemma - to take the chance and put their pet through painful surgery, or let him die. Golden retriever Dylan has a limp, and owner Stuart has driven seven hours from Preston to seek Noel Fitzpatrick's help. Meanwhile, Ginny from Chelsea arrives with her beloved dachshund Lilly-Belle, who has lost the use of her back legs

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge celebrates his birthday with a hot-air balloon ride over the chateau at sunrise, before setting to work in the kitchen making his own jam and alcohol from the vast quantities of fresh fruit waiting to be harvested in the garden. Angel Adoree starts work on a new project of her own - building a geodesic dome on top of a floating platform

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jonathan Broom and his wife Deborah have put everything on hold while he pursues his dream of building a miniature Hollywood Hills-style mansion. They stumble across a scrap of land in north London, but it's fraught with problems and the only way they can complete the £1million home is by sinking half of it six metres below ground. Surrounded on all sides by their neighbours' back gardens, the couple have to dismantle walls and fences and promise to put them back together again, and that's just the start of their difficulties. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets energy conservationist Andrew, who has decided to build a radical, self-heating home for his family - the first of its kind in the UK. He aims to heat the house all year round by storing the warmth of the summer sun into insulated earth banks over and around the house, and then drawing the warmth back into the living spaces in winter. However, this pioneering construction seems an exercise in trial and error from the start, and what began as a seemingly simple, pure concept becomes a complicated feat of engineering

programme.title: The Billion Pound Hotel
programme.desc: Shaped like a giant sail and standing more than 1,000ft tall, the Burj Al Arab in Dubai cost an estimated £1billion to build, and has been dubbed the world's most luxurious hotel. Guests paying anything up to £10,000 a night expect only the highest of standards, so what does it take for the staff to satisfy these demanding customers? This programme follows the stories of a variety of visitors, from the King of Uganda to a firefighter who has saved up months of wages, and the workers who serve them

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with team captain Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Lou Sanders. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by the Brett Domino Trio to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets energy conservationist Andrew, who has decided to build a radical, self-heating home for his family - the first of its kind in the UK. He aims to heat the house all year round by storing the warmth of the summer sun into insulated earth banks over and around the house, and then drawing the warmth back into the living spaces in winter. However, this pioneering construction seems an exercise in trial and error from the start, and what began as a seemingly simple, pure concept becomes a complicated feat of engineering

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to learn about the battle against the hidden nuisance that leads to corked wine, while in Cyprus, Matt Tebbutt solves the riddle of why cooking okra produces lots of slime. Plus, Kate Quilton looks into the surprising difference between runny and set honey

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Detroit Steel

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees bidders in Lewes battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef's gastronomic road trip brings him to northern Greece where he enjoys traditional dishes including veal stiffado and kotopita - which Rick declares to be the best chicken pie he has ever tasted. In the coastal city of Preveza he goes out prawn fishing and follows in the footsteps of poet Lord Byron visiting Messolonghi, a city where seafood is a highly regarded commodity. Rick also rolls up his own sleeves to cook his favourite Greek dishes of stuffed peppers and tomatoes and souvlaki

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick through a collection of American Civil War memorabilia, and also find a rare motorcycle engine

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef continues his 'journey without maps', leaving the main routes and tourist hotspots behind to embark on a personal road trip along picturesque and remote backroads. Here, he heads through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura - famous for Comte cheese and home to his favourite French dish of choucroute garni. He then begins to head inland, visiting Burgundy for a memorable glass of Auxey-Duresses wine, and sampling oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the French/Swiss border, he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff heads to Iceland to compete in the world's maddest motorsport, while Paddy McGuinness gets to grips with the latest Toyota Supra. Chris Harris investigates the story of the Lotus 79, arguably the most beautiful F1 car of all time

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Rival teams of amateur racers pit their wacky, gravity-powered soapbox vehicles in a downhill race against the clock in Paris

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In a first for the show, James May shocks the rest of the team when he puts his foot firmly on the accelerator of a Bugatti Veyron. Meanwhile, a case of bad driving and appalling trousers results in all three presenters getting thrown off a golf course. Actor Hugh Grant is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond and James May try to make a space shuttle out of a Reliant Robin, while Jeremy Clarkson puts the Porsche 911 Turbo through its paces. The Stig takes to the track in a Mercedes SL, and actor Simon Pegg opts for a more modest vehicle as the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Documentary with unrestricted access to America's Customs and Border Protection working on the bridges that separate Texas and Mexico, following the work of the many officers who police the bridges and keep America safe. In the first episode, a shipment of cardboard packaging hides a deadly secret, and heroin disguised as a laptop baffles the world's most advanced narcotic detection device

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes, and a truck carrying garden furniture has something extra in the load

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by space scientist Maggie Aderin-Pocock, comedian Phil Wang, actor Jason Watkins and EastEnders star Adam Woodyatt, aiming to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell feature in a special episode of out-takes, looking back over some of the best moments. Among the celebrity guests are Kevin Bishop, Warwick Davis, Romesh Ranganathan, Hugh Dennis, Sara Cox and Brian Blessed

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Dave's caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neil's christening. The event means a big reunion for the gang, at which Smithy receives surprising news from Nessa, and Stacey has a special request for her husband

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessa's plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.desc: The chef continues his 900-mile road trip from Venice to Istanbul, sampling that array of gastronomic delights that lie on the route. In his Symi island kitchen, Rick rolls up his sleeves to prepare galaktoboureko, a dessert of semolina custard in filo pastry, a favourite dish in Greece

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Neuschwanstein Castle in the Alps of southern Germany. Created for eccentric king Ludwig the second in the 19th century, the castle is both a visual and engineering marvel that was an influence on Walt Disney. Containing a huge throne room and man-made cave, it took 17 years to build but was never fully completed after Ludwig was deposed, incarcerated and mysteriously died in 1868

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces

programme.desc: The story of America's ‘Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalin's massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: The Queen's Castle
programme.desc: Documentary chronicling a year in the existence of 1,000-year-old Windsor Castle and its inhabitants, from the housekeeper and chefs to the Queen herself, who has allowed her public and private life to be documented more extensively than ever before. The state visit of former President of France Jacques Chirac sees the staff organise a banquet and a performance of a West End musical inside the building - but protesters outside threaten to mar proceedings

programme.title: The Queen's Castle
programme.desc: The Knights of the Garter arrive at Windsor Castle for their annual lunch with members of the monarchy, which includes a complicated procession through the palace. The royal archives allow cameras to view nearly 200 years of photo albums, including the thousands of photographs from the Queen Mother's collection, and the castle clock-maker faces a race to ensure all 450 timepieces on the estate are turned back

programme.title: The Queen's Castle
programme.desc: The Duke of Edinburgh, in his capacity as Ranger of the Great Park, takes a tour of Windsor's grounds and points out the modifications he has made during his tenure, including a deer park and a farm shop selling local produce. He then competes in the Royal Horse Show, which also features Prince Harry. Meanwhile, the Prince of Wales and the Duchess of Cornwall host a special banquet for the Prince's Trust

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor lands himself in a pickle thanks to a conjuring trick that proves to be far from magic, while busybody Mrs Warboys becomes convinced her husband is having an affair. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret invite Mrs Warboys to stay at their house until her flooded flat dries out. However, they soon come to regret their generous offer as she begins taking over the entire household. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Doreen Mantle star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A sultry widow surprisingly sets her sights on Victor, who is having difficulty getting to grips with his new home security system. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie, with a guest appearance by Barbara Windsor

programme.title: Tom Jones at the BBC
programme.desc: A celebration of the singer's performances, from the start of his career in the 1960s to his appearance on Later with Jools Holland just before he celebrated his 70th birthday in 2010. The programme includes archive footage of the Welshman's appearances on The Dusty Springfield Show and Top of the Pops

programme.title: Sings the Beatles
programme.desc: A look back through the BBC's archives at memorable covers of classic Beatles songs. Included are a performance of Day Tripper by Sandie Shaw, Shirley Bassey's version of Something, the Carpenters' rendition of Help!, Oasis's reinvention of I Am the Walrus, and Joe Cocker's chart-topping interpretation of With a Little Help from My Friends. Plus, Paul McCartney's solo performance of Lady Madonna

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Neuschwanstein Castle in the Alps of southern Germany. Created for eccentric king Ludwig the second in the 19th century, the castle is both a visual and engineering marvel that was an influence on Walt Disney. Containing a huge throne room and man-made cave, it took 17 years to build but was never fully completed after Ludwig was deposed, incarcerated and mysteriously died in 1868

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Piece Hall in Halifax, the only surviving 18th-century cloth hall where textiles were once traded. Items featured include a sapphire that jewellery specialist John Benjamin thinks is the biggest he has ever seen - but which the owner thinks is fake. Other finds include a Chinese imperial robe, a mysterious set of 17th-century doors, and the oldest piece of glass to ever appear on the show

programme.title: Impossible Railways
