programme.title: Spy in the Wild
programme.desc: The undercover cameras reveal how animals often get up to mischief among themselves - and some are downright criminal. A colony of adelie penguins hunker down to avoid a storm, unaware one of them is a thief out to steal the stones that make up their nests, and Spy Tropicbird witnesses an aerial attack by aggressive frigate birds who attempt to steal his fish. A boisterous elephant has a temper tantrum in the mud near the waterhole, chimpanzees have extra-marital affairs and lemurs get high by sniffing toxic millipedes

It's down to silversmith Brenton West to knock out the dents and give the stick its swagger back. The team also restores a miniature whisky barrel and an antique set of scales

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard haggles over a collection of medical antiques, visits a warehouse full of vintage Americana in Nottinghamshire, and takes a trip to a Scottish stately home

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The documentary focusing on various aspects of the legal system follows three of Hampshire's prolific repeat offenders, who are all trying to reform their lives after their release from prison. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel encounters a goldendoodle who sustained nerve damage to one of his front legs and a smashed wrist on the other side in a 20-metre fall. After the initial trauma, Angus was in significant pain and faced possible euthanasia. Distraught owner Zoe brings him to Fitzpatrick's in the hope that Noel can give her other alternatives. Also receiving attention is irrepressible springer spaniel Rocky, whose failed elbow operation has left him struggling to walk. His owners seek whatever options there may be for relieving the nine-year-old's pain and returning him to a full life

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. Retired dentist Leanne is recently divorced and in search of a sexually experimental man, while former US marine Conor, who falls in love all too easily, is looking for his dream Englishwoman

programme.title: A Very British Sex Shop
programme.desc: Documentary following the Richardsons, who run a chain of sex shops in Brighton and whose day-to-day dealings provide a unique insight into the bedroom habits of Britain. The film charts the family's efforts to keep business booming, from brainstorms on making the most out of the lucrative Valentine's season to a latex fashion show, starring owner Tim's daughter Kizzy

programme.title: The Super Orgasm
programme.desc: For most women multiple orgasms can seem almost mythical. But some can experience it not once, twice or even 10 times, but 60, 70 or 100 - a super-orgasm. In this documentary, a group of these women volunteer for a series of tests in a scientific investigation to reveal the truth behind the super-orgasm. The aim is to measure and record the phenomenon for the first time, finding out how the brain and the body react before, during and after, and asking if these women are wired differently to other people. And if not, is it something that could be learned by anyone?

But weeks later, it was revealed that Karen had known the truth all along - in a hoax kidnapping, Shannon was being kept hidden by a man known to her mother, who had plotted to claim the £50,000 reward money for her return

programme.title: Levi Bellfield: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: An investigation into the case of doorman and car clamper Levi Bellfield, who committed three murders - including that of schoolgirl Milly Dowler in 2002. But would he have gone on to claim even more victims had he not made a string of mistakes that alerted police? Interviews with detectives, including the officer who interrogated Bellfield, as well as a former partner of the murderer, reveal the errors that led to his arrest

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of American serial killer Dennis Rader, who was convicted in 2005 of murdering 10 people between 1974 and 1991. He became known as the 'BTK killer' after he offered it as a suggestion in a series of taunting letters to police and media - the letters standing for 'blind, torture, kill'. Through his own extraordinary testimony, the programme uncovers how this church deacon and scout leader led a double life as a sexual sadist and killer

programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.desc: An activist fighting for the rights of the Tamil people survives an assassination attempt at JFK airport, but it soon becomes clear that members of her close circle have also been targeted. Detective drama, directed by Steven Spielberg, starring Peter Falk, Jack Cassidy, Rosemary Forsyth and Barbara Colby

programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan

Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel

Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling

The duo manage to get hold of Siravo's accountant, who agrees to reveal all he knows in exchange for full immunity, but the trail leads to an old man in a coma in what seems to be a case of stolen identity

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a journalist is found murdered, but the case presents new evidence for an old crime involving a man serving a life sentence for spying for the Chinese government. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is killed in a crime displaying all the hallmarks of white supremacists who recruit teenagers to carry out acts of violence, and the team races to bring the ringleader to justice before more youngsters are butchered. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis re-examine a case closed since the 1960s after a vehicle containing the remains of a murdered man is dredged up from the Hudson River. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The chief suspect in the murder of several homeless men appears to be a schizophrenic street performer. Detectives Lupo and Bernard's problems compound when they find evidence suggesting a possible copycat is at work. Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected financial analyst dies from an overdose of Viagra, a drug he was advised not to take. The subsequent investigation uncovers foul play involving his mistress (guest star Julia Roberts) and an unscrupulous tycoon, whose attorneys thwart McCoy and Carmichael's attempts to prosecute. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sound-system installer is murdered after supplying goods to a strip club covertly operated by the Mafia, and the finger of blame points to a small-time hoodlum whose crime boss father is serving life imprisonment. The case eventually comes to trial - but investigators are disturbed to hear an untrustworthy government attorney is handling the prosecution. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An army scientist goes missing, so Abby is asked to temporarily replace him on a top-secret research project - but Gibbs later learns her assignment is connected to a current murder investigation, and worries she may meet the same fate as her predecessor. Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. When the body of a marine is found strung up at a construction site, the agents travel to LA to work with another NCIS team on an investigation into an international arms deal that escalates into a high-priority case, and Tony begins to pry into Ziva's life. Guest starring Chris O'Donnell and LL Cool J (NCIS: Los Angeles)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Agent Callen poses as an arms trade contact in a bid to catch killer Michael Aaron Rivkin. Meanwhile, Tony fears Ziva may not be loyal to the team, and a psychologist uncovers the truth about the relationship between Gibbs and Agent Macy. With Chris O'Donnell, Louise Lombard and LL Cool J

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Tobias Fornell pleads with Gibbs to do whatever is necessary to take down drug dealers in the area after his daughter is hospitalised from an opiate overdose, leaving Gibbs feeling haunted by aspects of the case. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson are assigned the case of a taxi driver found stabbed to death, and it soon emerges that the victim had a selection of false identities, leading the cops on a wild goose chase before they uncover any concrete leads. First episode of the spin-off drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The officers are called in to investigate when a successful newspaper columnist falls six storeys to her death, dressed only in her underwear. It soon emerges her psychiatrist had visited the apartment that day for dinner, but he seems reluctant to tell the police what went on, making them believe he could be hiding vital clues. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the hostess of a rock 'n' roll chat show is found murdered in her home, a web of intrigue slowly reveals itself to Logan and Wheeler, linking the woman's death with an ageing musician who seems to be involved in a case of child abuse

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magician disappears during a live-burial trick and is later found dead miles away from the location of his performance. Goren and Eames' investigation takes them deep into the mysterious world of magic as they try to unravel the conjuror's final act to identify the murderer

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Monroe find a treasure in Germany that has been hidden for centuries, while back in Portland, Renard joins Hank and Wu to track down a deadly assassin

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A local maskmaker targets Wesen to create Luchador masks that bestow great power to their wearers. As Nick, Hank, Monroe and Rosalee work to stop the killings, Renard considers an offer that will bring him closer to claiming his destiny. Meanwhile, Eve's further investigation of a recent incident raises new questions. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

With retirement now approaching, they are determined to find their perfect property in South Orlando. Armed with a budget of £110,000, Jonnie Irwin battles a fast-moving market to find them the best homes available on the market

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A man falls from the roof of a shop after drinking five pints of beer, and a homeowner suffers a freak accident while trying to assist removal men

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The team helps a farmer who has been impaled on a steel spike after an accident in a pig sty. A family take two successive camping trips that both end in 999 calls

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: An off-duty doctor tries to save an unconscious lorry driver whose vehicle has caught fire, and an air ambulance is sent to rescue a pensioner who has been knocked over

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea
programme.desc: On the east coast of Ireland, the crew of Courtown's inshore lifeboat face one of their most challenging rescues ever, trying to keep a teenage girl with suspected spinal injuries immobile and afloat for 40 minutes, knowing any movement could leave her paralysed for life. The Torbay crew have just minutes to find a capsized kayaker before she's dashed against the rocks, and just around the coast in Dartmouth, an 81-year-old sailor, fallen overboard in the middle of the night, is left clinging to a rope for his life

programme.desc: A car that had failed to stop then reverses at speed down a footpath, hitting the door of a police car. Officers assist security guards in a tower block by removing two women

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Family man Richard Cue, 57, has always felt grateful for the love and support he received from his adoptive parents, so he wants to find his birth mother to thank her for the sacrifice she made in giving him up in 1957. Having accessed his records, however, he has been searching for almost a decade with little success. Tania Bartlett's mother Julie fell pregnant to Iranian student Ahmed Kazem in the early 1960s, but the couple drifted apart when Julie felt unable to join Ahmed to start a new life in America. Despite intermittent contact with her father in the late 1970s and early 1980s, Tania has spent the past 30 years searching for him, not knowing if he is even alive. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell bring these families back together

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A new baby woolly monkey arrives, and it is up to the staff to play mother. Plus, the slow loris are relocated, and and ring-tailed lemur Al gets to meet some the gang

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team tries to get new mother Ayla to accept her baby, and chimpanzee Jestah receives a health check. Plus, golden-cheeked gibbons Peanut and Pung Yo receive a festive treat

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and wildlife vet John Lewis visit the park's sister sanctuary in Vietnam, and the team investigates a possible new home for golden-cheeked gibbons Nha and Cu Chi

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A wild gibbon goes on a violent rampage as Alison and the team carry out health checks at a Vietnamese national park. Meanwhile, Marina tracks a wild loris through the forest

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison comes to the aid of another small primate as she sets out to rescue Frank, a Geoffroy's marmoset. Plus, Bruce the slow loris is rejected by potential mate Bu

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jarno visit Moscow to collect a baby orangutan, and marmoset Frank meets his new housemate, Douglas

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: In Blyth on the northeast coast, PC Stuart Thomson receives a call from a mum whose disabled son is being bullied by a group of young people

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood presents footage of a shocking attack with a knife on a 60-year-old cashier, who then locks the door to trap the robber in, and someone with sticky fingers in the pub till gets caught out. Plus, a man stealing wedding dresses is about to have his big day ruined

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood exhibits footage a thief taking money from a family home caught on a spy-pen, as well as brazen burglars stealing furniture then a few minutes later selling it right outside the house. Plus, two muggers hot-footing it in the snow

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood learns how a couple faced a terrifying ordeal when violent thieves broke into their pub. Plus, the story of an office raider who was unaware a crowd of witnesses were watching his every move on camera, and a careless bank robber who forgot to bring along his swag bag

programme.title: Stop, Search, Seize
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Ireland's border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Officers battle to keep the peace on the streets when two warring parties come to blows. Documentary following the work of Greater Manchester Police

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Doug Clark and Carol M Bundy, a cunning pair of lovers-turned-murderers who targeted young girls and sex workers on LA's Sunset Strip in the late 1970s, brutally killing for their own twisted pleasure

programme.title: The Mark of a Killer
programme.desc: A look into the crimes of The Gainesville Ripper, who killed five students at the University of Florida and left the women posed like dolls

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The presenter explores the crimes of murderer Peter Manuel, who was hanged for killing seven people in Scotland during the 1950s

programme.title: Abducted
programme.desc: Every 12 hours a child in the UK is taken by a parent or family member, with the guardian left behind often going through years of heartache and red tape just to see them again. This documentary follows three parents on emotional and dramatic journeys as they fight their ex-partners through the international courts in a bid to get their children back from foreign countries. With access to a team of child-recovery experts, the film reveals how some parents are taking desperate measures. Narrated by Paul McGann

programme.title: Night Cops
programme.desc: A fight erupts at a teenager's party in Swindon, but police officers are surprised to find the mothers doing the scrapping. Cops in Darlington deal with a volatile prisoner, and a drunk with no regard for the law faces a sobering night in the cells

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Estate agent Brian Carlisle holds an open day at the Catrigg Force waterfall near Ribblesdale, hoping to attract potential buyers to the landmark. Plus, potholing enthusiasts Jude Onions and Johnny Latimer get married at Ingleborough cave, and Adrian Edmondson meets 10-year-old Daisy Watkiss, who hosts a weekly show on community station Drystone Radio

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson visits Middleham to meet racehorse trainer Simon West, who hopes to turn around the fortunes of the local stables. The presenter also catches up with farmers Carol and Phillip Mellin, who have embarked on a new venture breeding and training sheepdogs, while villagers in Swaledale hold a remembrance service to commemorate the 60th anniversary of the Hudswell air disaster

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary is summoned to court to answer drink-driving charges resulting from a binge in 1941. A ban looks likely - as does a visit to a counsellor to help save his ailing marriage. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Yvonne and Phoebe invite Gary to dinner on the same evening, and although best friend Ron cautions him against trying to keep both dates, his warnings fall on deaf ears. Nicholas Lyndhurst, Michelle Holmes and Dervla Kirwan star

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: Blackmail (1929)
programme.desc: A woman accidentally kills a would-be attacker in self-defence, and quickly flees the scene - but a sinister figure witnesses the event and attempts to blackmail her. Atmospheric early Hitchcock thriller, starring John Longden, Anny Ondra, Sara Allgood and Charles Paton

programme.title: Trottie True (1949)
programme.desc: A strong-willed showgirl marries into the aristocracy after a fling with a pioneering balloonist - but comes to regret her choice. Period comedy, with Jean Kent and James Donald

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Tom and Roy enter a pub quiz, determined to win and prove their minds are still young and agile. Comedy, starring Roger Lloyd Pack, Clive Swift, Jane Asher and Cherie Lunghi

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Sudbury and Perivale for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Ruth hires Sam as a chauffeur to give Tony an important message she cannot bring herself to deliver in person

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours of Abbey Wood and Ladywell for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Bloody Mama (1970)
programme.desc: A poverty-stricken psychotic woman goes on a rampage against society along with her homicidal children, robbing banks, kidnapping the wealthy and resorting to murder at the drop of a hat. Thriller based on the story of the infamous Ma Barker, starring Shelley Winters, Robert De Niro, Robert Walden, Don Stroud, Clint Kimbrough. Pat Hingle and Bruce Dern

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: The Tulip Bubble
programme.desc: Documentary about the Tulip craze of 1637, in which citizens of the Netherlands put their money into market speculation

programme.title: Glam Metal Detectives
programme.desc: Comedy sketch show from 1995, following the oddball characters of the rock band, Glam Metal Detective. Starring Gary Beadle and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: A chance to catch up on debates about the issues behind the headlines

programme.desc: Gary is summoned to court to answer drink-driving charges resulting from a binge in 1941. A ban looks likely - as does a visit to a counsellor to help save his ailing marriage. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart

programme.title: On the Up

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey

programme.title: Seven Thunders (1957)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers escape from German prison camps and hide out in a fishing village in occupied France. As they wait for the opportunity to return to England, they attract the attention of a doctor who is also a serial killer preying on fugitives from the Nazis. Second World War drama based on Rupert Croft-Cooke's novel, starring Stephen Boyd and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: Man on the Run (1949)
programme.desc: An army deserter finds himself falsely accused of murder when he accidentally stumbles into a pawn shop robbery. Thriller, starring Derek Farr and Joan Hopkins

programme.title: Henry V (1944)
programme.desc: The young king of England renounces his wild past and rallies the nation behind him as he reasserts his claim on French lands by divine right of kings - driving the two nations toward a climactic confrontation on the battlefield at Agincourt. Shakespeare's historical drama, directed by and starring Laurence Olivier. With Robert Newton, Leslie Banks and Esmond Knight

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: The London Nobody Knows
programme.desc: Part one of two. Historian Dan Cruickshank retraces the steps taken by Geoffrey Fletcher in his 1960s guide to the city, The London Nobody Knows. He sets out to explore what remains of the capital 50 years on, visiting Hackney market with writer Iain Sinclair and Wilton's Music Hall

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson visits Kirkby Malham to meet members of the Wildman family, who have a rich farming heritage in the area. Father Chris is a fifth-generation butcher who plans to build his own charcuterie on the farm. The presenter also heads to Nidderdale, where sheep farmer Suzanne Benson reveals all about her new business of llama-trekking

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Racehorse trainer Simon West begins to break in a new arrival from Ireland named Dolly. Plus, pregnant shepherdess Amanda Owen undertakes a 50-mile round trip to see the midwife and have her five-month scan, and Adrian Edmondson spends an evening with community choir the Buckden Singers

programme.title: Sophie's Choice (1982)
programme.desc: A Polish Holocaust survivor tries to start afresh in 1940s New York, but is tormented by ghosts from her nightmarish past, leaving her desperately seeking solace in a stormy relationship with an unpredictable chemist. But all is not as it seems, as a new neighbour seems set to discover. Drama, starring an Oscar-winning Meryl Streep alongside Kevin Kline and Peter MacNicol

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: The Starving Games (2013)
programme.desc: A futuristic society challenges teenagers from impoverished communities to fight to the death for food. A girl is persuaded to take her sister's place in the games, but is unprepared for the bizarre selection of characters waiting for her. Spoof of The Hunger Games, starring Maiara Walsh and Brant Daugherty

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Dewyne Lindsay visits the district of Thamesmead, which is 11 miles from Charing Cross on the South Bank of the River Thames.

programme.title: London Live News

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Exploring the London's surprising and secret wildlife, including seals, parakeets, badgers, foxes and even pelicans who have made London their home. The programme also focuses on the admirers of these animals, from Billingsgate fish porters and Indian chefs to Crayfish Bob, who scours the canals for foreign species

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Ways to School
programme.desc: Children who take treacherous journeys to school, climbing up mountainous paths, swimming across rivers or fighting their way through icy wastelands

programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. programme.title: EFL
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: EFL
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
